caption: The video appears to be an introduction or segment from "The Tiger Technicians Hour," dated June 8th, 2022, featuring Basil Chapman. The scene is set against a backdrop of a starry night sky, visible through what seems to be a circular opening, possibly a window or a portal. The text "PREDICT FUTURE" is prominently displayed in bold white letters, suggesting that the content may involve forecasting or speculative discussions about future events or technologies. Initially, three question marks appear above the text, which then disappear, leaving only the phrase "PREDICT FUTURE." This visual transition might symbolize the uncertainty and intrigue associated with predicting the future. The overall atmosphere is mysterious and thought-provoking, inviting viewers to engage with the topic of future predictions.
